title: Better MC [NEOFORGE] BMC5
description: Version 1.21.1 | Vanilla+ Experience With The Player in Mind | A New Era of Better MC!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebe5f6fbabd635b90d0643f34b6dd3e2a319947f.png)![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/785d3640a720d7e56cba3a6e2bbcdc37f34cf7e1.png)

✔️ Full parity with [Curseforge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/better-mc-neoforge-bmc5)

✔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation ([Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone), [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic))

✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

✔️ Overhauled Stronghold & Fortresses

✔️ Hundreds of NEW Dungeons & Structures ([Moog's Voyager Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-voyager-structures), [Yung's Mods Family](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG/mods), [Formations](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations): [Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations-nether) & [Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations-overworld))

✔️ New Bosses and Mobs ([Raided](https://modrinth.com/mod/raided), [Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge))

✔️ QoL Features such as [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) and [XP Tomes](https://modrinth.com/mod/xp-tome)

✔️ [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) with Additional Features

✔️ Rideable Dragons

✔️ Many Custom Features for an Improved Experience

✔️ Built-in, Free World Sharing

✔️ [200+ Mods](https://www.modpackindex.com/modpack/29331/better-mc-neoforge-bmc5)

[![alt text](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/fz4uivqmzunmkvtqd5hgu/tY38mPK.png?rlkey=qin5rs3z35sc2dgw82rrivsvp&st=5ikn6u6o&dl=1)](ttps://www.bisecthosting.com/p/lunapixel)
